text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Yasuda Kinen, and the racecourse
has been buzzing with energy since the early
morning.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! I can't believe it's already this packed! I
hope they haven't run out of Ogurin merch.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Let's divide and conquer! You go line up for
merch. I'll get permission for our banner.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me everyone here is an Oguri fan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the line for merchandise extending all the
way to the entrance, the crowd is almost
impossible to squeeze through. Oguri Cap's
popularity is unbelievable.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: And we're now in the belly of the beast!

I know, right? It almost feels like we're the away
team playing at Oguri Stadium, huh?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Morning. Between us and Oguri, this is a decisive
race for our class.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Still... we need to get really fired up if we don't
want to get smothered by the intense mood.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It isn't like you to sound so dispirited. Are you
feeling down? Is your heart not in the race?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Well, actually, I went and lost my kendo sword...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I was on disciplinary committee patrol after
classes and I set it against the wall so I could jot
something down in my notebook.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
While I was writing, I noticed someone breaking
the rules. She took off when I spoke up, so I ran
after her.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
When I realized I'd forgotten my sword and went
back for it, it was already gone.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I went to the lost and found, but no luck!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I know this isn't the time to be worrying about a
bamboo sword, but still...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: It's all right to be upset. It's important to you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That said, I'm sure some kind soul found it and
put it somewhere safe. That's what I would have
done.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You think so?! Heh... That's a weight off my
shoulders!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: All right! Now I'm ready to race!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: And that's a weight off my shoulders. Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Bamboo. You leave your sword behind the
school?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I did! You found it?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Okay, good. I had a feeling it was yours. I've been
holding onto it.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Really?! I've been looking for it everywhere!
Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh, I guess I should've brought it with me.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about it! Just knowing you have it is a
load off my chest. Now I'll be able to give it
everything I've got on the track!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm glad to hear that. Show me what you've got.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Raaaaah! I'm so fired up! Is there anything better
than good rivals who bring the best out of each
other?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
There's no bond as hot as the one between
friendly foes!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oguri! As thanks for finding my sword, I'm gonna
run the best I've ever run!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Good. Glad to hear.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: The bond between friendly foes... In my case...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I need to keep my end of our promise to do each
other proud.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm running for the two of them as well! I will beat
Oguri and Bamboo for all three of us!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text: Kyaaaaah! Oguriiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan B
text_block_list.text: I've been waiting for this day, Oguri! Good luck!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Yaeno Muteki! Lookin' good! Take everyone
down today!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
There are some who have taken to me. However,
that number is nothing compared to Oguri's fans.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...But that changes today!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Now that my mastery of blaze fierce, water still
gives me control of my burning obsession, I can
do it!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I will surpass Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I will burn this run into the memories of everyone
watching!
